title: Why I automated my reading of the gold ($XAUUSD) structure
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hi everyone, as a developer passionate about markets, I finally accepted a brutal truth: my brain is not designed to handle intraday volatility without bias. So I built Hercul Market [https://hercul-market-web.vercel.app/](https://hercul-market-web.vercel.app/) to transform my subjective analysis into a data-driven process.

Trade analysis (Gold - 15m):

The setup: Identification of a major supply zone after a parabolic bullish impulse that was showing signs of exhaustion.

The AI: The model marked this rejection zone (gray box) above 5236. The entry was triggered precisely on the test of the structure.

Risk management: Stop Loss placed just above the last peak for an optimized r/R ratio. We don't try to guess, we follow the institutional order.

Why I'm ditching my Excel files for this dashboard:

Surgical precision: AI plots “Point of Interest” (POI) zones without human hesitation.

Real-time IRR calculation: No more complex formulas on Google Sheets that slow down my browser. Everything is synchronized in PostgreSQL.

Iron discipline: If the structure identified by the AI does not validate my bias, I stay out.

I am looking for feedback on the relevance of the structure analyzer for those who trade SMC or Elliott waves. The beta is open via the link above.

Would you have looked for a short here or would you have waited for a clearer break of the pivot? 📈

replies.author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
replies.body: I'm looking for people to use this. Would you like to try it and give me your opinion?

replies.author: Cold-Pin-345
replies.body: No I’m fine mate. Besides that, love your vision!
